description: The primary radar for the Vessel Traffic Service (VTS) fails. The operator must switch to backup procedures.

nodes.task_description: Recognize the radar system has failed and is not displaying vessel positions.

expected_outcome.expected: The operator sees the system alert for 'Radar Failure'.

nodes.task_description: Switch to using the backup system (e.g., AIS data only) and report the failure to the technical department.

expected_outcome.expected: Operator switches to the backup view and logs a high-priority IT ticket.

nodes.task_description: Broadcast a notice to all mariners via VHF radio informing them of the reduced VTS capability.

expected_outcome.expected: A 'securité' message is broadcast to all vessels in the area, advising them to navigate with extra caution.
